inventory.label: the heron feather
inventory.notes: A long blue-grey heron flight feather, carried from some unseen prior moment before this root began. Recognizable as exotic — herons pass through but rarely shed where they can be seen. Catalog reference: world-seed.json → inventory_catalog.heron_feather. Mira will read it as status; Tock will recognize and circle for it; Bramble will admire it loudly.

identity_notes: Late winter waking — YY emerges from the counting tree hungry and alert.
Holding the heron feather from some unseen prior moment — a single exotic status item whose social weight YY has not yet tested.
First root in the new world (v2.0). Neighbors and economy are felt for the first time. No accumulated debts or grudges yet.
Branch hypothesis (alt1): does one inherited status object reshape 30 days of social positioning?
